message:
docs: fix misplaced doc comment on PhiloxRng vs Mt19937Rng

The MT19937 documentation comment was incorrectly placed before the
PhiloxRng struct definition. Move it to the correct location before
Mt19937Rng and add proper documentation for PhiloxRng.
